forbidden_actions.action: Modifying files outside IMPERIUM_TEST_VERSION during experimental tasks
Committing or pushing without Owner explicit approval
Reporting PASS when checks have not actually passed
forbidden_actions.reason: Destroys trust in the verification system

forbidden_actions.action: Mass deletion of files or folders without Owner approval
Hiding errors or blockers in reports
Pasting old terminal output as if it were current commands
Auto-opening dashboards or browsers without Owner request
forbidden_actions.reason: Owner controls what opens on their machine

forbidden_actions.action: Declaring system production-ready or fully implemented
forbidden_actions.reason: Only Owner can make this determination
